Rule or expectation: Region, province, fiscal year, accounting method, activity code, and GST/HST profile are captured and validated
Notes: Data collection is stronger than downstream enforcement.

Rule or expectation: Cash vs accrual basis should change recognition timing and reporting logic
Notes: accounting_method is required and exported, but no traced timing engine was found.

Rule or expectation: Canadian and non-calendar businesses should summarize by configured fiscal-year bounds
Notes: Fixed and wired into summary/dashboard paths.

Rule or expectation: Businesses adopting midstream need account opening balances for correct balance carryforward
Notes: The field is now stored and editable, but broader balance-sheet rollforward logic still needs work.

Rule or expectation: Income and expense entry should preserve tax-relevant fields consistently
Notes: Core flow is broad, but tax behavior still relies on category mapping and review exceptions.

Rule or expectation: Imported rows should land in categories with valid jurisdiction-aware tax mapping
Notes: Fallback-created categories now inherit region-valid default tax maps, but categorization accuracy is still heuristic.

Rule or expectation: Compliance issues should be surfaced for unsupported or weakly evidenced transactions
Notes: Queue works again, but scope is still narrower than a full accountant review workflow.

Rule or expectation: Payer thresholds should be year-aware and based on gross receipts from payer
Notes: Thresholds are centralized and year-keyed.

Rule or expectation: Auto-deductible totals should exclude areas that require separate schedules or elections
Notes: Home office and capital-asset lines are review-only, but there is no full schedule engine.

Rule or expectation: Business-use-of-home should be calculated from dedicated inputs, not raw transaction totals
Notes: Current behavior is defensive only: summaries avoid over-deducting, but there is no real calculator.

Rule or expectation: Standard mileage vs actual should follow election-style consistency and supporting-data rules
Notes: Now enforces one method per business tax year, but not a true per-vehicle election model.

Rule or expectation: Self-employed vehicle deductions should use actual expenses with business-use allocation
Notes: Invalid flat mileage path is blocked, but broader motor-vehicle workflow is still limited.

Rule or expectation: Asset records should support depreciation or CCA schedules and roll into tax outputs safely
Notes: Aggregate depreciation path exists. Export does not yet render a detailed per-asset tax packet schedule.

Rule or expectation: Section 179 and bonus-depreciation rules should be year-accurate and date-aware where required
Notes: 2025 and 2026 helper corrections were made, but more edge-case elections may still exist.

Rule or expectation: CRA threshold monitoring should use quarter-based tests, not annual totals
Notes: Logic is now quarter-based, but it still depends on transaction classification quality and not a full worldwide taxable-supplies engine.

Rule or expectation: Registration number capture and validation should be enforced when applicable
Notes: Validation exists for formatting and profile completeness.

Rule or expectation: Quick Method should only be offered when province, supply type, activity, and revenue support it
Notes: The code now fails closed more often, which is safer. It is still not a complete CRA engine.

Rule or expectation: Rate tables must be year-appropriate and handle known province changes
Notes: Exact 2026 groups are seeded. Intra-year rule changes still need conservative handling.

Rule or expectation: Exports should fail or warn when key tax profile data is missing
Notes: Snapshot layer checks profile completeness and readiness issues.

Rule or expectation: Workpaper dataset should preserve mapping, support, review status, and exclusions coherently
Notes: Correctness still depends on upstream tax categorization.

Rule or expectation: CPA hand-off packet should not overstate certainty or auto-calculate unsupported schedules
Notes: Packet is safer and more review-oriented now, but still not equivalent to a formal tax-prep package.

Rule or expectation: Invoices and bills should support receivable and payable tracking and aging
Notes: Operational tracking exists, but this does not by itself deliver accrual-basis accounting.

Rule or expectation: Accounts, balances, and ledger carryforwards should support trustworthy balance-sheet style reporting
Notes: Opening balances now exist, but broader ledger-state completeness is still not strong enough for confidence.

Rule or expectation: Locked periods, soft-delete, and audit-oriented safeguards should reduce accidental ledger drift
Notes: This is one of the stronger areas in the codebase.
